name: TIMBERLAND BANCORP INC
summary: Timberland Bancorp, Inc. is a Washington-based bank holding company for Timberland Bank, a community bank founded in 1915. The Bank offers a full range of lending and deposit services across six Washington counties through 23 branches. Lending focuses on real estate mortgage loans including residential and commercial construction, one-to-four family residential, multi-family, commercial real estate, land loans, commercial business loans, and consumer loans.
